overview: A high-energy, conversion-focused real estate website for Jay Mataji Real Estate Agency in Vadodara. Features bold branding, 24/7 availability positioning, demo property listings for Karelibagh area, WhatsApp/call-only CTAs, and immersive mobile UX with swipe cards and floating action buttons.
features: Hero section with live agent indicator and activity feed
8–12 demo property listings for Karelibagh area
Swipe cards on mobile, 3-column grid on desktop
Instant filters by Buy/Rent, budget, and location
Floating WhatsApp and Call buttons on mobile
Why Choose Us and Trust sections with animations
SEO meta tags for Vadodara/Karelibagh keywords
